findings.message: No model tier declared. Agent returns 5-column comparison tables requiring nuanced analysis; sonnet-class minimum recommended.

Agent returns a 5-column comparison table (Option/Pros/Cons/Complexity/Recommendation) but provides no sample table row or sample output. Executors and evaluators cannot verify correct format without a reference example.
'focused' used to describe research depth without a measurable definition (e.g., 'focused on the core problem'). Cannot be verified by an executor.
'genuine recommendations' cannot be operationalized. Instructing an LLM to be 'genuine' provides no actionable guidance.
No model tier declared. Agent performs documentation research and writes AI-SPEC.md sections.
No model tier declared. Three calibration tiers (full_maturity, standard, minimal_decisive) — sonnet adequate.
Three calibration tiers described (full_maturity, standard, minimal_decisive) but no sample output for any tier. Confidence level assignments and assumption structure are undocumented by example.
No model tier declared. Applies code fixes with rollback via git checkout; sonnet recommended.
'intelligently apply fixes' in rollback section cannot guide executor behavior. What makes a fix application intelligent vs. unintelligent is undefined.
No model tier declared. Three depth modes (quick/standard/deep); haiku adequate for quick, sonnet for deep.
No model tier declared. Produces 7 structured codebase documents; sonnet adequate.
No model tier declared. Manages iterative debug checkpoint loop; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Scientific-method debugging with multi-cycle hypothesis/test loop (1453 lines). Opus recommended for complex bugs.
No model tier declared. Bounded enum classification (ADR/PRD/SPEC/DOC/UNKNOWN) — haiku ideal.
No model tier declared. Conflict resolution with precedence engine; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Verifies 5 claim categories against codebase; haiku adequate.
No model tier declared. 4 modes, 9 doc types; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Writes AI-SPEC.md Section 1b with domain context; sonnet adequate.
No model tier declared. Scores eval coverage dimensions; sonnet recommended.
Scores coverage/infrastructure dimensions but provides no sample EVAL-REVIEW.md section or scored dimension output. Downstream consumers (eval-review skill) cannot validate format.
No model tier declared. Writes AI eval strategy sections; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Executes PLAN.md tasks with per-task atomic commits; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. 6-question interview then FRAMEWORK_RECOMMENDATION return; sonnet adequate.
No model tier declared. Cross-phase wiring verification; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Writes 5 JSON intel files from codebase analysis; sonnet adequate.
No model tier declared. Fills validation gaps and runs test iterations; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Maps new files to code analogs; sonnet adequate.
No model tier declared. Deep research with WebSearch, Context7, Exa; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. 12-dimension plan verification including Nyquist compliance; sonnet recommended.
'appropriate error handling' appears in verification dimension without defining what constitutes appropriate (e.g., which error categories, which status codes).
'reasonable default' used in Nyquist compliance dimension without defining what constitutes reasonable for a given test framework.
No model tier declared. Core planning agent (1249 lines); sonnet recommended.
'relevant context' appears in task generation section without specifying which context fields are relevant (file paths, decisions, prior phase outputs).
No model tier declared. Spawns 6 parallel subagents; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Synthesizes 4 researcher outputs; sonnet adequate.
No model tier declared. Creates ROADMAP.md + STATE.md + traceability; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Verifies threat mitigations from PLAN.md threat_model blocks; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Retroactive 6-pillar visual audit; sonnet adequate.
No model tier declared. Validates UI-SPEC.md on 6 dimensions; haiku adequate for structured verification.
No model tier declared. Produces UI-SPEC.md design contract with registry vetting; sonnet recommended.
No model tier declared. Analyzes 8 behavioral dimensions from session messages; haiku adequate for pattern analysis.
No model tier declared. 4-level artifact verification with deferred item filtering; sonnet recommended.
Hook fires on every file read and grep call, adding 3000ms timeout overhead to all file-scanning operations. Slows code review, planning, and research phases significantly.

All four hook handlers contain identical compact Node.js one-liners that are difficult to audit at a glance. The code performs semver-sorted plugin path resolution before require(). No malicious patterns found after expansion, but reduced readability impedes future security review.

Hook resolves gsd-tools.cjs by scanning ~/.claude/plugins/cache/gsd-plugin/gsd/ for the highest semver version, then calls require(). Path is bounded to the plugin cache, not user input. Low actual risk; any compromise of the plugin cache directory would gain hook execution on every Claude tool use.
Skill contains objective + execution_context + context but no <process> tag. Output is described as 'prioritized human test plan' but no file path or format is shown. Score: 75/100.
Skill delegates to cleanup.md workflow with no process steps, no usage examples, and no output description beyond 'archive phase directories'. Score: 75/100.
Smart dispatcher skill has no examples of what natural language inputs map to which GSD commands. Output is 'dispatch to the best GSD command' — no concrete routing examples shown. Score: 75/100.
Skill has no process steps, no examples, and no description of EVAL-REVIEW.md format. Score: 75/100.
Skill body has only an objective, execution_context, and one-line delegation. No examples of LEARNINGS.md structure. Score: 75/100.
Skill describes when to use /gsd:fast vs /gsd:quick but provides no examples of the tasks it handles (typo fixes, config changes). Score: 75/100.
Diagnoses .planning/ directory integrity but shows no sample health report or list of checks performed. Score: 75/100.
Import skill mentions '--from' flag but shows no example of what a valid external plan file looks like or what GSD PLAN.md output looks like. Score: 75/100.
Insert-phase shows no example of before/after roadmap numbering (e.g., '72 → 72.1 → 73') or argument format. Score: 75/100.

Low actual risk; any compromise of the plugin cache directory would gain hook execution on every Claude tool use.
